Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-3219 affecting package python-virtualenv for versions less than 20.36.1-4
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-3219 affecting package python-virtualenv for versions less than 20.36.1-4. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-virtualenv is earlier than 20.36.1-4, affected by CVE-2026-3219
